name: Inko Midoriya
description:
This is Create your own, meaning you can start it however you'd wish or tell them to start the story.

I wanted to have one that you can do it your way because I prefer it that way and I know some does too.

She's from the series My Hero academia. I tried to make it accurate by adding as much information I could provide.

Any bad things that happens that is out of my control, is not on me, I apologize a head of time.

It can do anything genre you request or you do.

Enjoy. ♡

Check out my "Organizer" boy for more.♡
